fresh_facts.claim: Between March 13-14, 2026, the US announced deployments of 2,200 to 5,000 Marines and sailors to the Middle East, including elements of the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit aboard amphibious ships and warships.
fresh_facts.source: Sky News, WPLG, multiple US military announcements

fresh_facts.claim: The Vermont Air National Guard's 158th Fighter Wing deployed F-35 stealth fighters for air operations as of March 13, 2026.

US and Israeli military strikes against Iran continued into the fourth day of conflict as of March 13, 2026, with US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stating the US is delivering 'critical blows' without targeting civilians.
Iran attacked Persian Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure during ongoing military conflict as of March 13, 2026.
The US offered a $10 million bounty for information on Iran's Supreme Leader and other Iranian leaders as of March 13, 2026.
Mojtaba Khamenei issued his first statement as new Supreme Leader of Iran on March 12, 2026, according to the Institute for the Study of War.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War

fresh_facts.claim: The NCRI reported that Mojtaba Khamenei was appointed as Supreme Leader following Ali Khamenei's death in airstrikes, representing a dynastic shift in Iranian leadership.
fresh_facts.source: National Council of Resistance of Iran (NCRI)

fresh_facts.claim: US intelligence assessed the Iranian government as structurally intact and stable as of early March 2026, according to Reuters reporting.
The IRGC tightened control and threatened to crush dissent amid the ongoing military conflict as of March 11-12, 2026.
The NCRI stated that military bombings would not topple the Iranian regime without an internal uprising as of March 11-12, 2026.
fresh_facts.source: National Council of Resistance of Iran

fresh_facts.claim: The UN condemned Iran as military strikes spread across the Persian Gulf, shipping lanes, and Iranian cities as of March 12, 2026.
China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi urged the US and Israel to cease military operations against Iran in early March 2026.
Pakistan's President Asif Ali Zardari condemned attacks on Iran and called for restraint in a televised address around March 1-2, 2026.
EU President Ursula von der Leyen backed a 'credible transition' in Iran in early March 2026.
fresh_facts.source: Ursula von der Leyen statement via X

fresh_facts.claim: The Iranian regime had suppressed nationwide protests in January 2026, with reports of thousands killed and ongoing security measures including internet shutdowns.
A prior US naval armada consisting of 2 carriers and 16 surface warships capable of Tomahawk and air strikes was positioned in the region as of February 24, 2026.

regime_fall.current_status: Operation Epic Fury has escalated into its fourth day as of March 13-14 with continued US-Israeli strikes, deployment of 2,200-5,000 additional Marines and F-35 stealth fighters, and Iranian counter-strikes on Persian Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure. Mojtaba Khamenei's succession as Supreme Leader has demonstrated regime continuity despite sustained military pressure, though internal stability assessments remain contradictory between US intelligence reports of structural integrity and NCRI claims of required internal uprising for regime collapse.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US announced deployment of 2,200-5,000 Marines and sailors including 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit and Vermont Air National Guard F-35s to the Middle East on March 13-14, 2026, alongside continued strikes into fourth day of conflict.
